Staff of Null  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 34
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 128
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 CHA: +10 INT: +20 MANA: +85 ENDUR: +85
SV COLD: +10
Effect: Cancel Magic (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 7.0) at Level 50
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: MNK NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Staff of Null
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 34
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 128
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM

Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Light:Large Lantern
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Atarak
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-02 11:43:21
Page Updated:Sat Sep 12th, 2020

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Veeshan's Peak 1.0
NPC Name
Milyex Vioren
Xygoz


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Veeshan's Peak 1.0


Uploaded November 27th, 2008

Drop info - Staff of Null

# Oct 26 2020 at 4:33 PM Rating: Good
Andhrimnir
Guru
251 posts
Confirmed to drop from Xygoz during Kunark era on TLP. May move to Milyex Vioren during revamp of VP 2.0 during OoW/GoD.
▲ Page top
Dropped from Milyex Vioren.
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2016 at 4:16 PM Rating: Excellent
Nniki
Guru
297 posts
Dropped from Milyex Vioren. It's currently listed as a drop from Xygoz, but I'm pretty sure it no longer drops from him. I haven't seen any of the dragon bosses still drop the old weapons.
▲ Page top
Dropped from Milyex Vioren.
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2021 at 3:50 PM Rating: Good
halfridge
Sage
87 posts
As of February 2021, confirmed that Staff of Cancellation drops from Milyex Vioren (Level: 65) in Veeshan's Peak 2.0 (not the Staff of Null).
▲ Page top
Dropped from Milyex Vioren.
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2020 at 8:56 AM Rating: Good

3 posts
I can verify this dropped from Xygoz today.
▲ Page top
Dropped from Milyex Vioren.
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2016 at 8:35 AM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Nniki wrote:
Dropped from Milyex Vioren. It's currently listed as a drop from Xygoz, but I'm pretty sure it no longer drops from him. I haven't seen any of the dragon bosses still drop the old weapons.



Updated the new drop info.

I hesitate to remove the drop from Xygoz without a better sense of what patch/revamp a bunch of changes were made to which NPC.
▲ Page top
Dropped from Milyex Vioren.
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2016 at 1:27 PM Rating: Excellent
Nniki
Guru
297 posts
I was looking over recent posts and wanted to make a note here:

July 14, 2004 was the day of the revamp, but the patch notes don't mention any specifics... just that elemental planes quality loot will now drop.
▲ Page top
The GM Stien
QuoteReply
# Apr 05 2003 at 2:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591785882959
View User Forum
24 posts
The GM Stien of moggok isn't around any more. You have lots of people trying to claim they are and sell them but if you look at the stats they are not any differnt that the one quested. Besides who wants 2 stiens?
▲ Page top
phenocryst
QuoteReply
# May 22 2002 at 2:18 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779124192
1 post
Well,

When u have a Stein of moggok (Int10), then just make the quite easy phenocryst focus quest. So u have 20 Int, with serveral stats and more important....resists.

not useless

# Oct 06 2001 at 7:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251216182
1 post
Notice the Effect: Cancel Magic?

This staff is always given to monks as a pulling tool. Not that any casters want this piece of junk for stat.

330 posts
Lol.... I always wondered how people could be so stupid and post twice in a row.... guess I found out. :) Itchy trigger finger and pressed the post button twice in a row..... oh well.
▲ Page top
RE: THIS SUX
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 2:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
Let's pretend, for an instant, that you COULD have two steins at the same time... This is 20 int.... those two would be 20 int.... does the stein offer at least 43 mana? Don't think so!

Seriously, I think someone was trying to be funny. If not, I would think it would be very very entertaining watching them type that, in person.
